case_title: HAROLD WRIGHT ET AL VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
